verses.text: Vanglian Topa aw, nangma ten'na mun bangzah takin etlawm ahi hiam
Ke'n ka lunggulh mahmah hi. Topa' huangsung ka lunggulh mahmah a, ka lungsim leh ka pumpi a nungta Pasian' tungah lungdam mahmahin la a sa hi
Vanglian Topa, ka kumpi leh ka Pasian aw, na biakna tau-ah, kawlgit nangawn in a inn ding mu a, phialphiah in a omna ding, a note a koihna ding bu a mu hi
Nangma inn sungah tengin, nangmah phatna a sa ngitnget mite thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi
Nangma tung panin thahatna ngahin Zion zuatna lampi a tawn nuam mite thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi
Amaute in Kuamkeu mun kantanin a pai laitakun tua kuam pen ciktui tampi tawh kidim a, guahzu masate in zong tua mun pen bualtuite tawh a kidimsak hi
Amaute a paikawmun a tha uh hat semsem a, pasian-te' Pasian Zion-ah mu ding uh hi
Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, ka thungetna hong za in la, ka thungetna hong ngai in, Jakob Pasian
Pasian aw, kote a hong hu dingpa hong etsak in la, na sathau nilhpa hong kem in
Bang hang hiam cih leh mun dangah ni tul khat om sangin nangma huang sungah ni khat om hoihzaw hi. Gitlohna inn sungah ka ten' sangin ka Pasian' inn kongcingpa ka hi nuamzaw hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian pen eite a hong hupa a minthang i kumpi hi a, maipha leh pahtawina a hong piapa ahi hi. Thumanin a gamta mite tungah Topa in na hoih bangmah sitlo hi
Vanglian Topa aw, nangmah a hong muang mite, thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
